channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: U.S. debt is a looming crisis today but was once a revolutionary masterstroke that helped launch a global financial superpower
item.description: Hamilton recognized how debt could unlock resources to transform the young republic, but first he had to untangle the Revolutionary War's mess.

item.title: Iran's envoy to China says Beijing to get Hormuz concessions
item.description: China, which buys almost all of Iran's oil exports, called Friday for unhindered shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Trump Accounts are now available for kids. Here's where the money will be invested, in line with Warren Buffett's advice
item.description: Money contributed to Trump Accounts at launch will be placed in the State Street SPDR Portfolio S&P 500 ETF as an initial default investment.

item.title: Trump allies intensify push to reshape the Federal Reserve
item.description: Cook remains a target after the high court allowed her to stay in her role, as does former Chair Jerome Powell.
